/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/EMTERM/ACM/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/REMA/ARBUCKLE/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 06-22-22/PPRF/

/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: RON STUECKLE, REPRESENTATIVE FROM SUNSET YOUTH SERVICES, APPEARS VIA ZOOM & A LETTER WAS PROVIDED TO THE PEOPLE REGARDING DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYMENT AT THE CHASE CENTER/EMMOD: DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE SF SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT OF DEFENDANT'S WORK SHIFT SCHEDULE, WITH THEPRE-AUTHORIZED WORK SCHEDULE, THE DEFENDANT MAY REMAIN OUT UNTIL 12AM ON THESE DAYS,/CONTD: TO SET OR DISPOSITION/DOP/

/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING & CONDITIONS/STWPX/X: RON STUECKLE, REPRESENTATIVE FROM SUNSET YOUTH SERVICES APPEARS ON ZOOM& A LETTER IS PROVIDEDFOR EMPLOYMENT/CTORD: DEFENDANT'S CURFEW IS MODIFIED & DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO LEAVE THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE FROM THE HOURS OF 5AM - 9PM//CTORD: ALL PREVIOUS RELEASE CONDITIONS REMAIN IN FULL EFFECT/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: MODIFICATION OF RELEASE CONDITIONS/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE/CTORD: CURFEW, DEFENDANT MUST REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISESOF RESIDENCE DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS: 6PM- 10AM/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: THE HEARING DATE OF 02-15-22 IS CONFIRMED,//LDPX: 03-21-22/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/CON: BRIAN BERSON/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:03-21-22 (60)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET OR DISPOSITION/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET OR DISPO/DEF: APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CONT/DOP/X: ZOOM OK,/
